name: sah-au-furniture-dupes
description: SAH Studios AU Furniture Lookalikes — an Australian designer-furniture comparison engine. Curated catalogue of designer originals + budget lookalikes, a spec-based similarity score (optional Claude vision blend), and a generated static comparison site monetised with affiliate links and featured placements.

scripts.pause: node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('PAUSED','paused '+new Date().toISOString()+'\n')" && echo "Kill-switch ENGAGED (PAUSED file created). Run npm run resume to lift."
scripts.test:all: npm run test:doctor && npm run test:catalogue && npm run test:similarity && npm run test:affiliates && npm run test:match && npm run test:build && npm run test:add && npm run test:import && npm run test:photo && npm run test:staleness && npm run test:report
